channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][PV][公开] Anime News Network One Piece 动画 Remake的 1st 预告 预告PV 公开 Mayumi Tanaka的 Reprisal as Luffy
item.description: Video previews Straw Hat crew for remake debuting worldwide in February 2027 ― Netflix unveiled during this year's Annecy International Film Festival on Wednesday the first teaser trailer for The One... | 来源: ANN | 原文: The One Piece Anime Remake's 1st Teaser Trailer Reveals Mayumi Tanaka's Reprisal as Luffy

(Tetsunabe no Jan!) presented an... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Iron Wok Jan! Anime's 'Alternate' Promo Video Reveals New Cast Member, Ending Song

item.title: [开播] Anime News Network Tomb Raider King Animated Series Streams Creditless 开播 Sequence

item.title: [动画][剧场版] Anime News Network GKIDS Release ChaO 动画 Film on Blu-ray Disc on September 22
item.description: Film opened in theaters in Japan in August 2025 ― GKIDS announced on Tuesday that it will release Yasuhiro Aoki and Studio 4°C's anime feature film ChaO on Blu-ray Disc in 1080p on September 22. The... | 来源: ANN | 原文: GKIDS to Release ChaO Anime Film on Blu-ray Disc on September 22
